test_scroll.description: Scroll inside the box to feel current settings.

anim_time.title: Animation time
anim_time.desc: How long each scroll movement lasts

accel_window.title: Acceleration window
accel_window.desc: Notches within this window stack momentum

tail_ratio.title: Tail to head ratio
tail_ratio.desc: Higher values give a sharper ease-out curve

easing_toggle.title: Smooth easing
easing_toggle.desc: Apply easing curve to each scroll movement

horizontal_smoothness.title: Smooth horizontal scrolling
horizontal_smoothness.desc: Apply smoothing to tilt-wheel and Shift+wheel scrolls

shift_horizontal.title: Shift converts to horizontal
shift_horizontal.desc: Holding Shift while scrolling becomes horizontal scroll

global_hotkey.title: Global hotkey
global_hotkey.desc: Press the chosen combination anywhere to toggle smooth scrolling

hotkey_accelerator.title: Hotkey combination
hotkey_accelerator.desc: Click and press the keys you want to use

start_minimized.title: Start minimized to tray
start_minimized.desc: Hide the settings window on launch

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Light, dark, or follow the system

excluded.empty: No apps excluded. Smooth scrolling is active everywhere.

dialog.title: Exclude an app
dialog.desc: Pick a running app or type its process name (without .exe).
